mapper.select: SELECT id, name, full_name, description, url, language, team, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM repo WHERE full_name = #{fullName} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, full_name, description, url, language, team, enabled, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM repo WHERE full_name = #{fullName} AND deleted = false AND enabled = true LIMIT 1
